name: Gautam Ramesh
title: Attending Physician, Sleep Medicine
bio:
Dr. Gautam Ramesh grew up in the metropolitan Detroit area, and he earned his medical
 degree from Michigan State University College of Human Medicine. He stayed in 
Michigan to complete his Neurology residency at Ascension Macomb-Oakland Hospital. 
For additional training, he attended the University of Chicago where he completed his 
Sleep Medicine fellowship. In his spare time, Gautam loves to travel, try new food, and 
spend time with his wife and dog.
